name: directinput_create_import_provider
description: DirectInputCreateA is provided by the DirectInput import/runtime provider and is not authored production source.
known_limits: DirectInputCreateA is an external DirectInput provider import; there is no authored function body to compare with VC COFF object bytes.
Final binary safety for this entry depends on PE import/provider verification rather than per-function source codegen.
The native smoke verifies that dinput.dll exports DirectInputCreateA on the host used for DirectInput provider-backed smoke tests.
